steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence reads: "Although scales are widely known as the source of a moth's color and pattern, the ______ of these scales goes beyond visual display: they also absorb the sun's heat." The blank must name something about scales that is broader than their visual role — a word that encompasses both the color/pattern function and the heat-absorption function.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'tendency': a tendency is a behavioral inclination, not a descriptor of the scales' range of functions. ✗
  • Choice B — 'attractiveness': attractiveness is purely about appearance — it cannot "go beyond visual display." ✗
  • Choice C — 'utility': utility means practical usefulness and naturally covers multiple purposes at once — both the visual display and the thermal function. ✓
  • Choice D — 'frailty': frailty describes weakness or fragility, irrelevant to what the scales accomplish. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
